scripts.test:home: rm -rf .tmp-tests && tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp-tests tests/home-interacciones.test.ts componentes/home/interaccionesHome.ts contenido/home/contenidoHome.ts && node .tmp-tests/tests/home-interacciones.test.js
scripts.test:catalogo: rm -rf .tmp-tests && tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp-tests tests/catalogo-filtros.test.ts tests/catalogo-busqueda-url.test.ts contenido/catalogo/catalogo.ts contenido/catalogo/filtrosCatalogo.ts contenido/catalogo/busquedaCatalogo.ts contenido/catalogo/estadoCatalogoUrl.ts && node .tmp-tests/tests/catalogo-filtros.test.js && node .tmp-tests/tests/catalogo-busqueda-url.test.js
scripts.test:catalogo-detalle: rm -rf .tmp-tests && tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp-tests tests/catalogo-detalle.test.ts contenido/catalogo/catalogo.ts contenido/catalogo/detalleCatalogo.ts && node .tmp-tests/tests/catalogo-detalle.test.js
scripts.test:encargo: rm -rf .tmp-tests && tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp-tests tests/encargo-consulta.test.ts tests/encargo-canal-contacto.test.ts contenido/catalogo/catalogo.ts contenido/catalogo/detalleCatalogo.ts contenido/catalogo/cestaRitual.ts contenido/catalogo/encargoConsulta.ts contenido/catalogo/canalContactoPublico.ts && node .tmp-tests/tests/encargo-consulta.test.js && node .tmp-tests/tests/encargo-canal-contacto.test.js
scripts.test:cesta: rm -rf .tmp-tests && tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp-tests tests/cesta-ritual.test.ts contenido/catalogo/catalogo.ts contenido/catalogo/cestaRitual.ts && node .tmp-tests/tests/cesta-ritual.test.js
scripts.test:shell: rm -rf .tmp-tests && tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp-tests tests/shell-global.test.ts contenido/shell/navegacionGlobal.ts && node .tmp-tests/tests/shell-global.test.js
scripts.test:marca: rm -rf .tmp-tests && tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp-tests tests/marca-contenido.test.ts contenido/marca/contenidoMarca.ts && node .tmp-tests/tests/marca-contenido.test.js
scripts.test:legal: rm -rf .tmp-tests && tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp-tests tests/legal-comercial.test.ts contenido/legal/paginasLegalesComerciales.ts contenido/catalogo/canalContactoPublico.ts && node .tmp-tests/tests/legal-comercial.test.js
scripts.test:checkout-demo: rm -rf .tmp-tests && tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .tmp-tests tests/checkout-demo.test.ts contenido/catalogo/catalogo.ts contenido/catalogo/cestaRitual.ts contenido/catalogo/checkoutDemo.ts contenido/catalogo/postCheckoutDemo.ts infraestructura/api/pedidosDemo.ts && node .tmp-tests/tests/checkout-demo.test.js
scripts.test:seo: rm -rf .tmp-tests && tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --outDir .tmp-tests tests/seo-metadata.test.ts infraestructura/seo/metadataSeo.ts && node .tmp-tests/tests/seo-metadata.test.js
